'''Ragithian Humans''' were [[Near-Human]]s who inhabited the high-[[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Ragith III]].

==Characteristics==
The descendants of [[Human/Legends|Human]] colonists, Ragithian Humans were the product of generations of selective breeding and genetic engineering to adapt to the high gravity of [[Ragith III]].<ref name="DeathStar" /> Because of this, Ragithians typically dwarfed baseline Humans, standing at two meters tall and weighing a hundred and ten kilos of adapted muscle.<ref name="DeathStar" /> In standard gravity, Ragithians possessed impressive strength; a Ragithian was capable of lifting a fully grown Human practically effortlessly with a single hand, and were more than strong enough to lift and flip [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeders]].<ref name="DeathStar" /> Despite their size, Ragithians were not hampered by their bulk - [[Rodo]], a Ragithian martial artist, was described as being incredibly fast and surprisingly agile, being more than capable of keeping up with the Human martial artist [[Nova Stihl]].<ref name="DeathStar" />
